description: MCP server configurations for BYOC development. Copy relevant sections to ~/.claude/claude_desktop_config.json or Claude Code settings.

github.description: GitHub operations — PRs, issues, branches, repos. Useful for creating PRs, checking CI status.
github.setup: Get PAT from https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo + PR scopes

railway.description: Railway PostgreSQL database management — view services, check deployment status, view logs.
railway.setup: Run: railway login. Requires Railway CLI installed: npm install -g @railway/cli

vercel.description: Vercel deployment management — view deployments, check build logs, manage env vars for byoc-rosy.vercel.app.

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing and manual test verification.
playwright.setup: Requires Playwright installed: npx playwright install

notes: BYOC uses Railway for PostgreSQL (not Supabase), so use the railway MCP instead of supabase
GitHub repo should be connected for CI/CD
Playwright MCP is useful for visually verifying UI changes
